mapper.select: SELECT id, username, nickname, email, role, avatar_url, password_hash, status, created_at, last_login_at FROM users WHERE username = #{account} OR email = #{account} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password_hash, nickname, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, 'user', 'active')
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE username = #{username}
